module.name: require-optional-chaining
module.description: Require optional chaining instead of repeated logical guard access.

scenarios.name: should allow optional chaining for nullable member access
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the member expression

scenarios.name: should allow a simple non-guarded property access when nullability is not involved
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the member expression

scenarios.name: should report a && a.b style guard access
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the logical expression

scenarios.name: should report a ternary null-check that can be replaced with optional chaining
scenarios.given: const name = user !== null ? user.name : undefined
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the conditional expression
